BEFORE AFTER
Drag to compare Real redesign — original vs. final concept
Case study: the original thumbnail leaned on a busy tech/glitch background with the subject repeated inside a 3D cube — visually interesting, but the focal point competed with itself. The redesign simplifies the composition around one clear expression, adds high-contrast bold typography, and uses supporting visual elements (the cube, the code, the warning tag) as background texture instead of the main focus — built to read clearly even at a small mobile thumbnail size.

Founder & Designer, Satish Designs

📍 India — serving clients worldwide, remotely
About

A single designer, focused on one thing.

Satish Designs is built around two years of hands-on experience designing YouTube thumbnails for real estate agents, business owners, and creators. There's no agency, no outsourcing, and no account managers — every project is designed personally by Satish Jaiswal, from the first concept to final delivery.

  • Quality over quantity — a limited number of projects at a time
  • Personal, direct communication with every client
  • Fast turnaround without cutting corners
  • Unlimited revisions until you're satisfied
  • Worldwide remote service, based in India
Selected Work

A portfolio built for one metric — clicks.

Real client redesigns across niches — click any real thumbnail to view it fullscreen, or scroll down for more recent work.

Why Clients Stay

Not a marketplace gig. A design partner.

Fast, Predictable Turnaround

Standard delivery in 24–48 hours, with rush options for launch-day deadlines.

Built on CTR Data, Not Guesswork

Every layout is informed by what actually earns clicks in your specific niche.

Unlimited Revisions, One Designer

You work directly with Satish — no account managers, no outsourcing.

Not Sure Where to Start?

Get a free channel thumbnail analysis.

Send your channel link and I'll tell you — honestly — what's working, what's costing you clicks, and what I'd change. No obligation.

Email Me for Free Analysis
How It Works

From brief to delivered thumbnail.

01

Submit Your Brief

Send your script, photos, brand assets and reference thumbnails through your dashboard — no email needed.

02

Concept & First Draft

You'll receive an initial concept within 24 hours, built around your niche's proven CTR patterns.

03

Revise Together

Leave comments directly on the image. Revisions happen in real time inside the chat.

04

Download & Publish

Get your final PNG, layered PSD, and export pack — ready to upload the moment it's approved.
